title: Dark Reaper Shoots! 2
description:
Dark Reaper Shoots! 2 is a new sequel to the smartphone game Dark Reaper Shoots!, which previously recorded 5.30 million downloads.

Overcome relentless attacks and dominate the battlefieldDefeat enemies to collect skills and acquire more powerful abilities. Skill combinations can lead to significant power-ups! Customize your style to your liking and bring victory to your side.

Collect materials in various stagesStrengthen yourself with materials obtained from the stages and advance to new, unseen stages. In addition to the skill tree, you can enhance your abilities and acquire special skills by crafting weapons and masks.

 

Let's Power Up Your Partner, Gawgaw!Gawgaw is the familiar and loyal companion of the lonely Grim Reaper. Despite its cute appearance, it's a powerful support character that can easily defeat numerous enemies.

ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー

To All Players of the Original Mobile Version of Dark Reaper Shoots!: 
Since our launch in 2013, we have been profoundly grateful for the immense love and support from fans all around the world. Even after the service ended, your unyielding passion and endless emails with requests such as "Please bring the Game back" were the ultimate driving force that brought the Dark Reaper Shoots! 2 project to life. We would like to take this opportunity to express our deepest gratitude to each and every one of you who reached out to us. Fueled by your passion, SummerTimeStudio will continue to push boundaries and take on new challenges.
description_short: Become a Grim Reaper seeking peace and mow down the beasts of hell! This is a casual roguelike survivor action game where you craft various weapons, grow stronger with your partner GawGaw, and fight your way through the battles.
